message:
feat(redis): enable transaction (MULTI/EXEC) and pubsub APIs

Uncomment the previously block-commented transaction() and pubsub()
methods on RedisClient. These delegate to the existing Transaction
and RedisPubSub implementations which were already present but
gated behind comments, likely pending stabilization of the
underlying connection pool. No logic changes to the method bodies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
